description: ipanema  flip-flops draw inspiration from the culture of the Brazilian city of Ipanema. The  tropical city's street style is reinterpreted in iPanema  footwear  - bold prints, vibrant colours and quirky embellishments. A brand with a cause, iPanema collaborated with Gisele Bü ndchen for a climate change project and these products represent their commitment to social-change.UpperSlim T-straps with grooves and branding in a metallic hueSoft footbedBranded lug on the footbedPrint on the footbedCurved footbedOutsoleSingle piece PVC moulded, flexible outsoleWaffle patterned groovesFlip flop careWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
